name: High-Resolution CT Chest
description: High-resolution CT of the chest for interstitial lung disease evaluation

findings.technique: High-resolution CT of the chest was performed in supine and prone positions.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lung Parenchyma
sections.content: Lung parenchyma [shows no interstitial thickening / no honeycombing / no ground-glass opacities].

sections.name: Distribution
sections.content: No peripheral or basal distribution of interstitial changes.

sections.name: Bronchiectasis
sections.content: No traction bronchiectasis or bronchial wall thickening.

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: Pleural surfaces [are smooth / no pleural thickening / no effusion].

impression:
1. No interstitial lung disease.
2. Normal HRCT chest.
author: RadReport Templates
